text: AI is rapidly changing the way we work, bringing both opportunities and challenges. One major impact is automation, where software handles repetitive tasks like data entry, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart scheduling and writing assistants, help people finish tasks faster and with fewer errors. However, this doesn't mean humans will become obsolete. Instead, the future focuses on human-AI collaboration, where people guide machines and make final decisions. This shift is creating job changes: while some roles may disappear, new ones requiring technical and analytical skills are emerging. Adaptability and learning will be key to thriving in this evolving workplace.
